violations.claim: PROVEN: projectRoot is always a defined string — findProjectRoot always returns startDir as fallback
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 134
; PROVEN: projectRoot is always a defined string — findProjectRoot always returns startDir as fallback
(declare-const walk_found_marker Int)      ; 1 = .neurallog/.git/package.json found in tree
(declare-const projectRoot_is_defined Int) ; 1 = projectRoot is a non-null string
; Code transition: findProjectRoot terminates when dir === dirname(dir) (filesystem root)
; Code transition: final statement is "return startDir" — always executes if no marker found
(assert (=> (= walk_found_marker 0) (= projectRoot_is_defined 1)))
(assert (=> (= walk_found_marker 1) (= projectRoot_is_defined 1)))
; Negation: projectRoot is undefined
(assert (= projectRoot_is_defined 0))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: VIOLATION: "Project: X" claims X is the project root, but X may be the fallback startDir
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 134
; VIOLATION: "Project: X" claims X is the project root, but X may be the fallback startDir
(declare-const marker_found_in_tree Int)   ; 1 = walk found .neurallog/.git/package.json
(declare-const projectRoot_has_marker Int) ; 1 = returned dir contains a project marker
; Code transition: findProjectRoot returns dir only upon finding statSync match
(assert (=> (= marker_found_in_tree 1) (= projectRoot_has_marker 1)))
; Code transition: if walk exhausts the tree with no match, returns original startDir
(assert (=> (= marker_found_in_tree 0) (= projectRoot_has_marker 0)))
; Violation scenario: no project markers in entire ancestor chain
(assert (= marker_found_in_tree 0))
(assert (= projectRoot_has_marker 0))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: VIOLATION: dirname(resolve(".")) = parent(cwd), so findProjectRoot starts above the project dir
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 134
; VIOLATION: dirname(resolve(".")) = parent(cwd), so findProjectRoot starts above the project dir
; when no positional arg is provided, the search skips the actual cwd entirely
(declare-const positional_arg_present Int)   ; 1 = non-flag arg exists in args
(declare-const filePath_is_cwd Int)          ; 1 = filePath = resolve(".") = cwd
(declare-const search_starts_at_cwd Int)     ; 1 = findProjectRoot starts at cwd
(declare-const marker_in_cwd Int)            ; 1 = .neurallog/.git/package.json lives in cwd
(declare-const projectRoot_equals_cwd Int)   ; 1 = cwd correctly identified as project root
; Code transition: no positional arg → || "." → resolve(".") = cwd
(assert (= positional_arg_present 0))
(assert (=> (= positional_arg_present 0) (= filePath_is_cwd 1)))
; Code transition: dirname(cwd) = parent(cwd) — NOT cwd itself
; dirname("/home/user/project") = "/home/user" — one level above
(assert (=> (= filePath_is_cwd 1) (= search_starts_at_cwd 0)))
; The project has its markers inside cwd (normal case)
(assert (= marker_in_cwd 1))
; Code transition: search starting above cwd cannot descend back into cwd — only ascends
(assert (=> (and (= search_starts_at_cwd 0) (= marker_in_cwd 1)) (= projectRoot_equals_cwd 0)))
; Violation: cwd contains project markers but is not identified as the project root
(assert (= projectRoot_equals_cwd 0))
(assert (= marker_in_cwd 1))
(check-sat)
